<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "Near-real-time forecast validation"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: asis

from helpers.live_validation_manifest import render_live_validation_table

print(
    "<p>Near-real-time validation compares recent operational forecasts with recent Class IV observations. "
    "It is intended for scientific validation and daily monitoring, not for annual benchmark ranking.</p>"
)
print(render_live_validation_table("reports/nrt-validation-manifest.json"))
```
